active_projects.description: Revise docs/installation.md to target macOS users only (remove NixOS references). Include installation steps for Homebrew, Node, Claude Code, and any other dependencies, assuming only WezTerm (or default macOS Terminal) is installed. Order sections so dependencies come first, and each section should check whether the dependency is already installed so users can skip to the next step.

artifacts.summary: Audit of NixOS references to remove, 8 dependencies with detection/install/verify commands, recommended section order, and per-section template for macOS-only installation guide
Team research with 4 teammates (Primary, Alternatives, Critic, Horizons)
8-phase plan (~7.5h) to split docs/agent-system.md into docs/agent-system/ subdirectory, extract docs/installation.md with claude-acp setup, and repair 9 inbound links
Split agent-system.md into 7 new focused files, repaired 9 inbound links, added agent_servers section, deleted old file

active_projects.completion_summary: Split docs/agent-system.md (378 lines) into docs/agent-system/ subdirectory (README, zed-agent-panel, workflow, commands, context-and-memory, architecture) plus new docs/installation.md with first-class claude-acp coverage. Repaired 9 inbound links across README.md, docs/README.md, docs/settings.md, and docs/office-workflows.md, added agent_servers reference section to docs/settings.md, and deleted the old monolithic file.
Rewrote docs/agent-system.md (185 -> 378 lines) with Main Workflow section, topic-grouped Command Catalog, dedicated Memory System section, and 22 verified cross-references into .claude/ docs.

artifacts.summary: Detailed content comparison between zed-claude-office-guide.md and docs/, with integration recommendations
Revised implementation plan - assume macOS throughout

active_projects.completion_summary: Integrated zed-claude-office-guide.md content into docs/ (macOS-focused, Cmd-based, Word/Excel) and deleted the original guide. Updated docs/README.md, top-level README.md, docs/settings.md, and config-report.md to reflect the macOS platform.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive inventory of 20+ Zed agent panel keybindings across 9 categories
2-phase plan to add comprehensive agent keybindings to docs/keybindings.md and docs/agent-system.md
Implementation summary for keybinding documentation expansion

active_projects.completion_summary: Expanded docs/keybindings.md with 20+ agent shortcuts across 9 categories (panel, threads, navigation, models, inline assist, edit predictions, Claude ACP). Added quick reference table to docs/agent-system.md. Fixed broken keybindings link.

artifacts.summary: 5-phase plan: Scheme A keybindings, no vim, collaborator guide

active_projects.completion_summary: Configured Zed editor with settings.json, keymap.json (Scheme A, 6 bindings), tasks.json, and 5 documentation files. Rewrote project-overview.md from Neovim to Zed. No vim mode; standard keybindings throughout.
